的核心数据库，旨在弥合抽象创意与具象代码之间的鸿沟。他的存在是为了让每一个设计想法都能被精准地转译为视觉语言。'},{type:"image",url:"https://a.lovart.ai/artifacts/user/1vpLdFcL3oFvdchk.png"}]},G={columns:[{key:"no",title:"No.",type:"number",width:67},{key:"shot_type",title:"Shot iN=`
@property --voice-capsule-α {
  syntax: '<angle>';
  initial-value: 0deg;
  inherits: false;
}
@keyframes voice-capsule-rainbow {
  from { --voice-capsule-α: 0deg; }
  to { --voice-capsule-α: 360deg; }
}
@keyframes voice-capsule-progress {
  0% { transform: scaleX(0); }
  60% { transform: scaleX(0.5); }
  100% { transform: scaleX(0.9); }
}
@keyframes voice-capsule-shimmer {
  0% { background-position: 100% 0; }
  100% { background-position: -100% 0; }
}
.voice-capsule-shimmer {
  --shimmer-highlight: color-mix(in oklch, currentColor, white 60%);
  background: linear-gradient(
    105deg,
    currentColor 0%, currentColor 40%,
    color-mix(in oklch, var(--shimmer-highlight), currentColor 70%) 45%,
    var(--shimmer-highlight) 50%,
    color-mix(in oklch, var(--shimmer-highlight), currentColor 70%) 55%,
    currentColor 60%, currentColor 100%
  );
  background-size: 200% 100%;
  -webkit-background-clip: text;
  background-clip: text;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
  animation: voice-capsule-shimmer 1.2s linear infinite;
  display: inline-block;
}

iN=`
@property --voice-capsule-α {
  syntax: '<angle>';
  initial-value: 0deg;
  inherits: false;
}
@keyframes voice-capsule-rainbow {
  from { --voice-capsule-α: 0deg; }
  to { --voice-capsule-α: 360deg; }
}
@keyframes voice-capsule-progress {
  0% { transform: scaleX(0); }
  60% { transform: scaleX(0.5); }
  100% { transform: scaleX(0.9); }
}
@keyframes voice-capsule-shimmer {
  0% { background-position: 100% 0; }
  100% { background-position: -100% 0; }
}
.voice-capsule-shimmer {
  --shimmer-highlight: color-mix(in oklch, currentColor, white 60%);
  background: linear-gradient(
    105deg,
    currentColor 0%, currentColor 40%,
    color-mix(in oklch, var(--shimmer-highlight), currentColor 70%) 45%,
    var(--shimmer-highlight) 50%,
    color-mix(in oklch, var(--shimmer-highlight), currentColor 70%) 55%,
    currentColor 60%, currentColor 100%
  );
  background-size: 200% 100%;
  -webkit-background-clip: text;
  background-clip: text;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
  animation: voice-capsule-shimmer 1.2s linear infinite;
  display: inline-block;
}
